description_long: This is a modern rectangular table featuring a polished white marble top with subtle gray veining, giving it a luxurious and contemporary appearance. The tabletop has softly rounded corners and edges, enhancing its sleek profile. Supporting the table is a geometric metal base with a bronze or brass finish, forming an angular, open-frame structure that provides both stability and visual interest. The legs are arranged in a V-shape at each end, connected by a horizontal bar near the floor for added strength. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible drawers or additional components, making it suitable for both dining and meeting purposes. Its materials and style suggest it would fit well in upscale urban environments such as cafes, lobbies, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern rectangular table with a white marble top and angular bronze-finished metal legs, featuring a sleek and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the marble tabletop and the angular metal base with V-shaped legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the table and the depth of the marble top, with the V-shaped leg structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the marble surface and the geometric metal base from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the table's depth and the angled support legs.
